info.name: Island Combo - Scanner API (Login + Cash Vouchers)
info.description:
Minimal partner-facing surface for the voucher scanner app.

FLOW
1. POST /api/auth/login with a STAFF (or admin) account -> saves accessToken + refreshToken into collection variables.
2. Every voucher request sends `Authorization: Bearer {{accessToken}}` (collection-level auth) automatically.
3. When the access token expires (~1h, see `expiresAt`), run Auth > Refresh Token -> new tokens are saved automatically.

RESPONSE ENVELOPE (all endpoints)
Success: { "success": true, "data": ..., "message"? }
Failure: { "success": false, "message": "..." }

Set the `baseUrl` collection variable to the deployment you are targeting before running.

request.description:
Sign in with a STAFF or ADMIN account. Returns { role, redirectTo, accessToken, refreshToken, expiresAt, tokenType }. The test script saves accessToken + refreshToken for the voucher requests.

400 = invalid credentials (failed attempts are recorded in the security audit log).
Exchange the refreshToken for a fresh token bundle when the access token expires (~1h). Returns { accessToken, refreshToken, expiresAt, tokenType }. 401 = refresh token invalid/expired: log in again.

Read-only check of a scanned QR `code` - never mutates, safe to call on every scan.

200 = { success, data: { valid, status, reason, voucher? } }
  valid:  true only when status === 'ACTIVE'
  status: ACTIVE | REDEEMED | EXPIRED | CANCELLED | NOT_FOUND
  reason: OK | NOT_FOUND | ALREADY_REDEEMED | EXPIRED | CANCELLED
  voucher (when found): { code, amount, recipient_name, recipient_email, status, claimed_at, redeemed_recipient_name }

An unknown code is a 200 with valid:false / NOT_FOUND (a verdict, not an error).
400 (no code) | 401 (no/invalid token) | 403 (not staff).

Atomically flips an ACTIVE voucher to REDEEMED and records who released the cash. Single-redeem-safe: a second concurrent redeem loses the race and gets 409.

200 = { success, data: <full voucher row>, message: 'Voucher redeemed.' }
400 (missing fields) | 401 (no/invalid token) | 403 (not staff)
404 (code not found) | 409 (already redeemed / not ACTIVE / lost the race)
